description: Copper Point of Sale is open on the Windows desktop showing the main POS register screen. The system has existing inventory items pre-loaded from a real retail product catalog. Add a new menu item named 'Organic Green Tea 20pk' to the 'Beverages' category with a price of $8.99, a cost of $4.50, and the description 'Premium organic green tea, 20 tea bags per box'. Verify that the item is saved to the inventory list.
